summary: Phase 3.7i Testing Complete - All features verified. Staff navigation rewritten to top header, /staff/tasks and /staff/messaging routes working, Kanban URL filters working, Messaging E2E flow working (Applicant<->Staff), Task creation working, Mobile responsive navigation working.

minor.issue: Fixed: Task creation was returning 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization. Fixed by excluding _id and serializing datetime fields.

critical_code_review_comments: Staff Layout: Rewritten from sidebar to top header navigation ✓
/staff/messaging route: Works correctly, shows StaffMessagingPage with conversations ✓
Kanban URL filter: /staff/kanban?stage=lead_new shows only lead_new applications ✓
Kanban URL filter: /staff/kanban?stage=pending_docs shows only pending_docs applications ✓
Kanban 'Filter entfernen' button: Clears filter and removes URL param ✓
Dashboard KPI cards: Link correctly to filtered Kanban views ✓
Messaging E2E: Applicant can send message via /portal/messages ✓
Messaging E2E: Staff can see conversations and reply via /staff/messaging ✓
Messaging: sender_name field included in messages ✓
Messaging: participant_names and participant_roles enriched in conversations ✓
Task creation: Works via UI with title, description, priority ✓
Mobile responsive: Top header collapses to hamburger menu ✓
Mobile nav: All items visible (Dashboard, Kanban, Aufgaben, Nachrichten, Abmelden) ✓
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created: TEST_Phase37i_Task, TEST_StatusUpdate_Task, TEST_Phase37i_UITask_341214. Test messages created in support conversation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7i complete. Staff navigation is now TOP HEADER (not sidebar). Routes /staff/tasks and /staff/messaging work correctly. Kanban supports URL query param ?stage=xxx for filtering. Messaging system fully functional with support conversations auto-created for applicants. Task creation fixed (ObjectId serialization issue resolved). Mobile responsive navigation working. Cookie banner must be dismissed before login.
passed_checks: Backend: Health endpoint returns OK
Backend: Staff login returns staff role
Backend: Applicant login returns applicant role
Backend: List tasks endpoint works
Backend: Create task endpoint works (fixed ObjectId serialization)
Backend: Update task status endpoint works
Backend: Get/create support conversation works
Backend: List conversations works for applicant and staff
Backend: Send message works for applicant
Backend: Send message works for staff (reply)
Backend: Get conversation messages works
Backend: Messages include sender_name field
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint works
Backend: Applications list endpoint works
Backend: Conversations have participant_names enrichment
Backend: Conversations have last_message_preview
Frontend: Staff Dashboard loads with top navigation header
Frontend: Desktop nav shows Dashboard, Kanban, Aufgaben, Nachrichten
Frontend: KPI cards visible (Neue Anfragen, In Bearbeitung, Docs ausstehend, Gesamt)
Frontend: Schnellzugriff links visible (Kanban, Aufgaben, Nachrichten)
Frontend: /staff/tasks route works - StaffTasksPage loads
Frontend: /staff/messaging route works - StaffMessagingPage loads
Frontend: Neue Anfragen KPI links to /staff/kanban?stage=lead_new
Frontend: Docs ausstehend KPI links to /staff/kanban?stage=pending_docs
Frontend: Kanban stage filter banner displays correctly
Frontend: 'Filter entfernen' button clears filter
Frontend: Direct URL navigation with stage filter works
Frontend: Applicant can access /portal/messages
Frontend: Applicant can send message
Frontend: Staff can see conversations in /staff/messaging
Frontend: Staff can open conversation and see messages
Frontend: Staff can send reply message
Frontend: Task creation form opens
Frontend: Task creation works with title, description, priority
Frontend: Mobile menu button visible on small screens
Frontend: Mobile navigation opens with all items

bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: MongoDB insert_one() modifies dict in-place adding _id (ObjectId), and datetime objects not serialized
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Exclude _id from response dict and convert datetime fields to ISO format strings
